text: A person may not engage in business as a dealer, directly or indirectly, including by consignment, without a dealer general distinguishing number in one of the categories described by Section 503.029 (Application for Dealer General Distinguishing Number) (a)(6) for each location from which the person conducts business as a dealer.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.021 — Dealer General Distinguishing Number

A person may not engage in business as a dealer, directly or indirectly, including by consignment, without a dealer general distinguishing number in one of the categories described by Section 503.029 (Application for Dealer General Distinguishing Number) (a)(6) for each location from which the person conducts business as a dealer.

*Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 710 (H.B.2216), Sec. 4, eff. June 15, 2007.*
